steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: Combine the $x$-terms: $x + 2x = 3x$. Combine the constants: $7 + (-4) = 3$. The result is $3x + 3$.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content:
• A: $3x - 3$ - The constant is $+3$, not $-3$. Eliminated.
  • B: $3x + 3$ - Matches exactly. That matches the correct answer - B is correct.
  • C: $3x - 11$ - Incorrect constant; would require $-7 - 4 = -11$, which changes the sign of 7. Eliminated.
  • D: $3x + 11$ - Incorrect constant; would require $7 + 4 = 11$, ignoring the minus sign. Eliminated.
